base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dpad_direction_active_overlay — a ui from 1986 dragon quest. Arc-shaped active-direction indicator — shown when player drags on D-pad. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Arc-shaped active-direction indicator — shown when player drags on D-pad; highlights selected direction
